answers: Standup comedy is a performance where a comedian speaks directly to an audience, delivering jokes, stories, and observations. It requires timing, stage presence, and the ability to connect with the crowd.
Standup shuru korte hole open mic nights e jao — okhane notun comedians 5-10 minutes er set perform kore. Jokes likho, practice koro mirror er samne, ar stage e utho. Rejection er jonno ready thako!

Legendary comedians include Dave Chappelle, Jerry Seinfeld, Eddie Murphy, Kevin Hart, and George Carlin. In South Asia, comedians like Zakir Khan, Biswa Kalyan Rath, and Munawar Faruqui have become hugely popular.

A comedy special is a full-length recorded performance, usually 60-90 minutes, released on platforms like Netflix or YouTube. Writing jokes involves finding the funny in everyday observations, using setup-punchline structure, and lots of editing.
